title: PM Lane 331 - Project Miner Temp Power Customer Delivery And Durable Proof Review Publication Gate Packet
authority_basis: Standing PM blocker authority and repo technical authority, used here to classify the current hosted blocker precisely and package the next step as publish-only follow-through for the separately admitted delivery/proof slice.
activation_condition: The separately admitted delivery/proof review route is implemented locally and validated by focused pytest.
No current published proof exists that the public mutation-seam hosts serve the new routes.
current_truth: Bounded hosted smoke against both https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com and https://apex-platform-mutation-seam.onrender.com still omits the delivery/proof review routes from OpenAPI and returns framework 404 Not Found for the delivery/proof readback route.
The delivery/proof review slice and its hosted-smoke readiness surfaces remain modified or untracked local worktree state.
The next truthful blocker is publication of the admitted slice to clean-main, not vague hosted troubleshooting.
allowed_actions: Publish only the admitted delivery/proof review slice to clean-main.
Use bounded hosted smoke with --include-temp-power-customer-delivery-proof-review to verify promotion on both public hosts.
Update PM lane docs and canonical status only after hosted truth is revalidated.
not_allowed: No finance behavior, source writeback, or customer billing delivery work.
No auth, ingress, DNS, or secret changes.
No widening beyond the separately admitted delivery/proof review slice.
validation: Hosted smoke on both the custom domain and the Render hostname using --include-temp-power-customer-delivery-proof-review
git status --short on the delivery/proof slice
git diff --check on touched Lane 331 files
validation_result: PASS: both public hosts still omit the delivery/proof review routes, local publication state proves the slice is not yet published, and the next step is now packaged as a publish-only follow-up rather than an ambiguous hosted blocker.
